guide: This needs Combat 15 and a completion
of the 2 previous floors to enter.
To efficiently grind this, you should
get help from Party Finder/Friends.
Mine normal or Pure Ores in the Dwarven Mines.
You'll want to get as much Mining Speed
and Spread for this as you can.
Pickobulus is another great helper.
You will gain passive progress in this
by having a pet equipped at all times.
Even a Lvl 100 pet counts for this.
You will need Combat 12 for this.
Getting a Void Sword and Ender Armor
will make progress in this easier.
You should use SkyHanni's Trapper features
to make this easier. Use /warp trapper
to get back to Trevor whenever you want.
You will need a bow for this.
Use the wiki to figure out what Fetchur asks for.
You will need to get into Dwarven Mines to be
able to even talk to him.
Fish in the Hub until you can enter the Backwater Bayou.
Fish there and lootshare mobs until you unlock
Fishing Minions. Place as many of them on your island,
as you can and give them the best fuel and storage
you have access to and don't forget to collect in time.
The easiest solution for this is the Jerry pet.
For this you only need 8 Move Jerry and an Egg.
Those drop with a 20% chance from the chicken
in The Barn.
For this you'll want to unlock the Experimentation Table
at Enchanting 10 and play the Daily Games.

note: Obtain a Mediocre Ring of Love
guide: Follow the Romero Questline until you
get this. You will only need
1 Yellow Rock, 15 poppies and 64 Emerald.

note: Kill 25 Goblins during a Goblin Raid
guide: Kill Goblins in the Goblin Burrows
while an event is going on.
You need Mining Level 12 for this.
To help with this, try to make bigger crafts
by hand for Carpentry levels.
Also do your daily experiments and make sure
to have a pet active at all times
(any pet works, even level 100).
Kill Zombies in The Hub to unlock Zombie Minions.
Buy the daily Rotten Flesh from the Adventurer in The Hub
and place them on your island. Give them the best fuel
and storage that you have access to and collect in time.
Recommended for this is either Zombie
or Spider Slayer. You will need a total
of 1220 XP for that Slayer.
(T1/T2: 1 each, T3: 11) or
Recommended gear for this is Ender Armor
and a Void Sword or you can rely
on help from friends.
Complete a Floor 1 with a score of 230+
and buy the chest afterwards. If you can't buy
immediately, either save money and buy it from
Croesus within the next 2 days or do another run.
You will probably need help with this.

note: Gain 5 Strength from a Training Weight
guide: For this you'll want to grab a Training Weight
from a secret in dungeons and keep it in your
inventory till it shows a Strength bonus of +5.
Drop it once it reached that point.
This will take 100 Minutes of playtime.
You will get the Rock Pet by mining 2.5k
Ore Blocks. Keep in mind that Stone doesn't
count for this. Don't forget to equip the pet ;)
You can unlock 17/17 Farming Collections,
6/11 Combat Collections, 6/6 Foraging Collections,
14/22 Mining Collections for a total of 43 collections.
You will also get some Fishing Collections.
Craft some easy minions while also getting
those that will help with this Bingo.
Use NPC shops to buy materials for easy crafts.
You can visit all Islands by using warp commands.
The Hub, Spider's Den, The End,
Gold Mine, Deep Caverns,
Farming Isles. Remember that some of them
require certain skill levels to enter.
Use the Jerry Pet from A Best Friend and
upgrade it with Kat.
This only takes 10s to upgrade.
Kill goblins or open loot chests in the Crystal Hollows,
then just throw them until you get a Golden Goblin.
Higher level eggs have higher chances of spawning,
but are also rarer to get.
Optimal tool:
Golden Axe with Efficiency 5
Reforges: Double-Bit or Lush
Get Haste 3 from a splash to instamine wood
Forage in the Hub for this.
Don't forget to get your Sweep up
if you consider to manually do this.
Place as many minions as you can
give them a medium storage and the best fuel
you can. Collect them in time.
Talk to Jamie in the Hub and
claim the Rogue Sword from him.
Right click it to gain +100 Speed,
or just wait for a splash.
Depending on your Bingo Rank, Alixers
Splash might also be enough for this.
You will get some progress for this
by working on other goals.
The easiest to go for are:
Birch Wood, Oak Wood, Pufferfish,
Sand, Wheat, Jungle Wood and Seeds.
